# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { SignJWT, jwtVerify, JWTPayload } from 'jose';

// Configuration
const JWT_SECRET = new TextEncoder().encode(
  process.env.JWT_SECRET || ''
);

const PUBLIC_PATHS = new Set([
  '/login',
  '/register',
  '/forgot-password',
  '/api/auth/login',
  '/api/auth/register',
  '/api/auth/refresh',
  '/_next',
  '/favicon.ico',
  '/public',
]);

const AUTH_COOKIE_NAME = '__auth_token';
const REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME = '__refresh_token';
const TOKEN_EXPIRY = '15m';
const REFRESH_EXPIRY = '7d';

interface AuthPayload extends JWTPayload {
  sub: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  iat: number;
  exp: number;
}

function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  if (PUBLIC_PATHS.has(pathname)) return true;
  for (const publicPath of PUBLIC_PATHS) {
    if (pathname.startsWith(publicPath + '/') || pathname.startsWith(publicPath)) {
      return true;
    }
  }
  return false;
}

function isStaticAsset(pathname: string): boolean {
  return (
    pathname.startsWith('/_next/static') ||
    pathname.startsWith('/_next/image') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.ico') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.svg') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.png') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.jpg') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.css') ||
    pathname.endsWith('.js')
  );
}

async function verifyToken(token: string): Promise<AuthPayload | null> {
  try {
    if (!token || typeof token !== 'string') {
      return null;
    }

    // Basic format validation before attempting verification
    const parts = token.split('.');
    if (parts.length !== 3) {
      return null;
    }

    const { payload } = await jwtVerify(token, JWT_SECRET, {
      algorithms: ['HS256'],
      clockTolerance: 5,
    });

    // Validate required fields
    if (!payload.sub || !payload.exp) {
      return null;
    }

    return payload as AuthPayload;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

async function generateToken(payload: Omit<AuthPayload, 'iat' | 'exp'>): Promise<string> {
  return new SignJWT({ ...payload })
    .setProtectedHeader({ alg: 'HS256', typ: 'JWT' })
    .setIssuedAt()
    .setExpirationTime(TOKEN_EXPIRY)
    .setNotBefore('0s')
    .sign(JWT_SECRET);
}

async function generateRefreshToken(sub: string): Promise<string> {
  return new SignJWT({ sub, type: 'refresh' })
    .setProtectedHeader({ alg: 'HS256', typ: 'JWT' })
    .setIssuedAt()
    .setExpirationTime(REFRESH_EXPIRY)
    .setNotBefore('0s')
    .sign(JWT_SECRET);
}

function setSecureCookie(
  response: NextResponse,
  name: string,
  value: string,
  maxAge: number
): void {
  response.cookies.set(name, value, {
    httpOnly: true,
    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    sameSite: 'lax',
    path: '/',
    maxAge,
  });
}

function clearAuthCookies(response: NextResponse): void {
  response.cookies.set(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME, '', {
    httpOnly: true,
    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    sameSite: 'lax',
    path: '/',
    maxAge: 0,
  });
  response.cookies.set(REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME, '', {
    httpOnly: true,
    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    sameSite: 'lax',
    path: '/',
    maxAge: 0,
  });
}

function addSecurityHeaders(response: NextResponse): void {
  response.headers.set('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff');
  response.headers.set('X-Frame-Options', 'DENY');
  response.headers.set('X-XSS-Protection', '1; mode=block');
  response.headers.set('Referrer-Policy', 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin');
  response.headers.set(
    'Strict-Transport-Security',
    'max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload'
  );
  response.headers.set(
    'Permissions-Policy',
    'camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()'
  );
  // Remove server identification headers
  response.headers.delete('X-Powered-By');
}

// Simple in-memory rate limiter for edge runtime
const rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetTime: number }>();
const RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 60 * 1000; // 1 minute
const RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 100;

function checkRateLimit(ip: string): boolean {
  const now = Date.now();
  const entry = rateLimitMap.get(ip);

  // Clean up old entries periodically
  if (rateLimitMap.size > 10000) {
    for (const [key, val] of rateLimitMap) {
      if (val.resetTime < now) {
        rateLimitMap.delete(key);
      }
    }
  }

  if (!entry || entry.resetTime < now) {
    rateLimitMap.set(ip, { count: 1, resetTime: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW });
    return true;
  }

  entry.count++;
  if (entry.count > RATE_LIMIT_MAX) {
    return false;
  }

  return true;
}

export default async function middleware(request: NextRequest): Promise<NextResponse> {
  const { pathname } = request.nextUrl;

  // Skip static assets entirely
  if (isStaticAsset(pathname)) {
    return NextResponse.next();
  }

  // Rate limiting
  const clientIp =
    request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||
    request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||
    'unknown';

  if (!checkRateLimit(clientIp)) {
    const rateLimitResponse = NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Too many requests' },
      { status: 429 }
    );
    rateLimitResponse.headers.set('Retry-After', '60');
    addSecurityHeaders(rateLimitResponse);
    return rateLimitResponse;
  }

  // Allow public paths without authentication
  if (isPublicPath(pathname)) {
    const response = NextResponse.next();
    addSecurityHeaders(response);
    return response;
  }

  // Check for JWT secret configuration
  if (!process.env.JWT_SECRET) {
    console.error('JWT_SECRET environment variable is not configured');
    if (pathname.startsWith('/api/')) {
      const errorResponse = NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Internal server error' },
        { status: 500 }
      );
      addSecurityHeaders(errorResponse);
      return errorResponse;
    }
    const redirectUrl = new URL('/login', request.url);
    const redirectResponse = NextResponse.redirect(redirectUrl);
    addSecurityHeaders(redirectResponse);
    return redirectResponse;
  }

  // Extract auth token from cookie
  const authToken = request.cookies.get(AUTH_COOKIE_NAME)?.value;
  const refreshToken = request.cookies.get(REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME)?.value;

  // Verify the auth token
  let authPayload = authToken ? await verifyToken(authToken) : null;

  // If auth token is invalid, try to refresh
  if (!authPayload && refreshToken) {
    const refreshPayload = await verifyToken(refreshToken);

    if (refreshPayload && refreshPayload.sub) {
      try {
        // Generate new tokens
        const newAuthToken = await generateToken({
          sub: refreshPayload.sub,
          email: (refreshPayload as AuthPayload).email || '',
          role: (refreshPayload as AuthPayload).role || 'user',
        });
        const newRefreshToken = await generateRefreshToken(refreshPayload.sub);

        // Verify the newly generated token to get the payload
        authPayload = await verifyToken(newAuthToken);

        if (authPayload) {
          const response = NextResponse.next();
          addSecurityHeaders(response);

          // Set user info in request headers for downstream use
          response.headers.set('x-user-id', authPayload.sub);
          response.headers.set('x-user-email', authPayload.email || '');
          response.headers.set('x-user-role', authPayload.role || 'user');

          // Set new cookies
          setSecureCookie(response, AUTH_COOKIE_NAME, newAuthToken, 15 * 60); // 15 minutes
          setSecureCookie(response, REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME, newRefreshToken, 7 * 24 * 60 * 60); // 7 days

          return response;
        }
      } catch {
        // Token refresh failed, fall through to unauthenticated handling
      }
    }
  }

  // Handle unauthenticated requests
  if (!authPayload) {
    // For API routes, return 401
    if (pathname.startsWith('/api/')) {
      const unauthorizedResponse = NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Authentication required', code: 'UNAUTHORIZED' },
        { status: 401 }
      );
      clearAuthCookies(unauthorizedResponse);
      addSecurityHeaders(unauthorizedResponse);
      return unauthorizedResponse;
    }

    // For page routes, redirect to login with return URL
    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', request.url);
    // Sanitize the redirect path to prevent open redirect
    const sanitizedPath = pathname.startsWith('/') ? pathname : '/';
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('returnTo', sanitizedPath);

    const redirectResponse = NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl);
    clearAuthCookies(redirectResponse);
    addSecurityHeaders(redirectResponse);
    return redirectResponse;
  }

  // Token is valid - check if it's about to expire (less than 5 minutes remaining)
  const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
  const timeUntilExpiry = (authPayload.exp || 0) - now;
  let response: NextResponse;

  if (timeUntilExpiry < 300 && refreshToken) {
    // Proactively refresh the token
    try {
      const newAuthToken = await generateToken({
        sub: authPayload.sub,
        email: authPayload.email,
        role: authPayload.role,
      });

      response = NextResponse.next();
      setSecureCookie(response, AUTH_COOKIE_NAME, newAuthToken, 15 * 60);
    } catch {
      response = NextResponse.next();
    }
  } else {
    response = NextResponse.next();
  }

  // Set user info in request headers for downstream handlers
  response.headers.set('x-user-id', authPayload.sub);
  response.headers.set('x-user-email', authPayload.email || '');
  response.headers.set('x-user-role', authPayload.role || 'user');

  // Prevent authenticated users from accessing login/register pages
  if (pathname === '/login' || pathname === '/register') {
    const dashboardUrl = new URL('/dashboard', request.url);
    const redirectResponse = NextResponse.redirect(dashboardUrl);
    addSecurityHeaders(redirectResponse);
    return redirectResponse;
  }

  addSecurityHeaders(response);
  return response;
}

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    /*
     * Match all request paths except:
     * - _next/static (static files)
     * - _next/image (image optimization files)
     * - favicon.ico (favicon file)
     */
    '/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico).*)',
  ],
};

// Export utility functions for use in API routes
export { generateToken, generateRefreshToken, verifyToken, setSecureCookie, clearAuthCookies, AUTH_COOKIE_NAME, REFRESH_COOKIE_NAME };
export type { AuthPayload };
